summary: Comprehensive testing of Fire Prediction System completed successfully. All backend APIs working (100% success rate), frontend components rendering correctly, real-time updates functioning, and integration between frontend/backend seamless.
passed_tests: Fire prediction high risk scenario (98% probability, High risk)
Fire prediction low risk scenario (0% probability, Low risk)
Historical data endpoint (chart data for 7 days)
Input validation (422 error for invalid data)
Fire prediction form with high/low risk inputs
Report incident form submission with success message
Real-time geospatial map centered on India (20.5937, 78.9629)
Live feed displaying real-time fire incidents
Historical chart with BAR/LINE toggle functionality
Dark theme with red/blue/black color scheme
All data-testid attributes present for testing
